title: Update pharmacy contact details with real information

requirements.summary: Update all village/locality references throughout the site to 'Kalaiya 10'
acceptanceCriteria: The text 'Kalaiya 10' appears as the village/locality name in the hero section headline or subheading
Footer contact details show 'Kalaiya 10' as part of the address
No generic placeholder village name remains anywhere in the UI

file_operations.description: Update the hero section headline or subheading to reference 'Kalaiya 10' as the locality, replacing any existing generic village or area placeholder text.
Update the contact details address to include 'Kalaiya 10' as the village/locality portion of the address, replacing any generic placeholder.
Update the address info card to display 'Kalaiya 10' as part of the location, replacing any existing placeholder village or area name.
Update any location references in the pharmacy story or community section to use 'Kalaiya 10', replacing generic placeholders if present.

requirements.summary: Update the pharmacy phone number to '9824284662' across all UI components
acceptanceCriteria: The Call Now button links to 'tel:9824284662'
The WhatsApp button links to 'https://wa.me/9779824284662' (Nepal country code prefix)
The phone number '9824284662' is displayed in the footer and contact page
No old placeholder phone number remains anywhere in the UI

file_operations.description: Update the Call Now tel: link to 'tel:9824284662' and the WhatsApp wa.me link to 'https://wa.me/9779824284662' (using Nepal +977 country code).
Update the Call Now CTA button href to link to 'tel:9824284662', replacing any existing phone number.
Update the phone number in the contact section to display and link to '9824284662'. Update any WhatsApp link to 'https://wa.me/9779824284662'.
Update the phone and WhatsApp contact info cards to display '9824284662' with appropriate tel: and wa.me links (using +977 prefix for WhatsApp).
Update any phone number references in the hero CTA buttons or contact information to '9824284662', replacing existing placeholders.
Update the contact CTA card phone and WhatsApp links to '9824284662' and 'https://wa.me/9779824284662' respectively.
Update any WhatsApp enquiry links in product category cards to 'https://wa.me/9779824284662', replacing existing phone numbers.

requirements.summary: Update the full address to 'Kalaiya 10, Bara, Nepal' in Footer and Contact page
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays the address 'Kalaiya 10, Bara, Nepal'
Contact page address info card shows 'Kalaiya 10, Bara, Nepal'

file_operations.description: Update the full mailing address in the contact details section to display 'Kalaiya 10, Bara, Nepal', replacing any existing placeholder address.
Update the address info card to display the complete address 'Kalaiya 10, Bara, Nepal', replacing any generic placeholder.

requirements.summary: Update the pharmacist/owner name to 'Ahsan Ansari' on the About page
acceptanceCriteria: The name 'Ahsan Ansari' appears in the About Us team/staff section
No generic placeholder staff name (e.g., 'Pharmacist Name') remains visible on any page

file_operations.description: Update the team member or pharmacist name in the staff section to 'Ahsan Ansari', replacing any existing placeholder name. Ensure the name appears alongside the generated staff-pharmacist image (frontend/public/assets/generated/staff-pharmacist.dim_600x600.png).

requirements.summary: Update SEO meta tags to incorporate 'Kalaiya, Bara, Nepal' location details
acceptanceCriteria: The HTML <title> tag references 'Kalaiya' or 'Bara, Nepal'
The meta description mentions 'Kalaiya 10, Bara' or similar specific location

file_operations.description: Update the <title> tag to include 'Kalaiya, Bara, Nepal' (e.g., 'Arogya Pharmacy - Kalaiya, Bara, Nepal'). Update the meta description to naturally reference 'Kalaiya 10, Bara'. Update meta keywords to include 'Kalaiya', 'Bara', 'Nepal'. Update og:title and og:description to reflect the location as well.
